name: Albi

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against Albi's current restaurant-issued dinner and sweets PDFs captured and visually reviewed on 2026-07-14.
The current catalog contains 41 food and nonalcoholic formulations across 11 real sections: 24 dinner formulations and 17 sweets, small-bite, tea, or qahwah formulations.

Twenty-five frozen rows represent current formulations. GRILLED BONE-IN STRIP and CUCUMBER & GREEN STRAWBERRY are stale; KHUBZ + is a section heading; the malformed second MAHALABIYA row is a parser artifact.

The current PDFs contain 16 formulations omitted from the frozen output, including SOFRA, SMOKED PEA, LABNE TABAT, SLOW COOKED LONG RIB, five additional Alhalwaa/soft-serve products, five small bites, and two qahwah products.
The dinner and sweets nightcap pages were reviewed; alcohol-only products remain outside the food/nonalcoholic catalog.
The current official menu PDFs publish selected fixed components but no complete ingredient recipes or item-level allergen matrix.
Thirty-one current formulations have positive contains signals from fixed published terms or mandatory named food formats; ten have no supported fixed signal.

Albi's official FAQ says the kitchen cannot guarantee an allergen-free environment and cannot accommodate sesame sensitivities. The specific sesame limitation is represented as global may-contain sesame for all 41 formulations.
The broader no-guarantee statement is not expanded into invented may-contain claims for every allergen, and the restaurant's allium/nightshade limitations are not converted into app allergen fields.

All 25 current frozen rows require correction: 24 omitted at least one current fixed or global signal; BBQ’D LAMB KEBABS already had fixed sesame but lacked the distinct global sesame cross-contact scope.

The frozen generic PDF extraction collapsed 11 source sections into broad Mashawi, Mezze, and Middle Eastern buckets, omitted 16 current formulations, retained two stale dishes, and promoted a section heading and duplicate glyph/price fragment into products.
It incompletely mapped fixed ingredient text and did not incorporate the official FAQ's sesame limitation.

The correction rebuilds every current formulation from the visually reviewed PDFs, retains configurable SOFRA and herbal-tea semantics, and separates fixed contains signals from global FAQ cross-contact.

The shared menu-item classifier falsely rejected three real sweets because rose/arak resembled alcohol-list bleed; its food recognition now considers section context and explicit soft-serve and Middle Eastern pastry names.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the restaurant-issued menu index and confirmed its current Dinner and Sweets PDF links.
Captured all eight pages and visually reviewed every nonempty food page, yielding 24 current dinner formulations across six real sections.
notes: The nightcap page was reviewed and alcohol-only products were excluded.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured all four pages and visually reviewed every nonempty food/nonalcoholic page, yielding 17 current formulations across five real sections.
notes: The nightcap page was reviewed and alcohol-only products were excluded.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured the current FAQ and verified its no-allergen-free guarantee plus inability to accommodate allium, nightshade, and sesame sensitivities.
notes: Only the specific sesame limitation maps to the app's allergen taxonomy.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Found current fixed menu descriptions and the official FAQ warning, but no complete item-level allergen matrix, recipe disclosure, or negative safety claims.

findings.summary: The frozen 29-row catalog flattened the current PDF structure, omitted 16 formulations, retained two stale dishes, and promoted two nonproducts.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 41 current formulations across all 11 source sections, restored every omission, removed both stale dishes, and rejected the KHUBZ + heading and duplicate malformed MAHALABIYA row.

findings.summary: All 25 current frozen rows had incomplete semantics because fixed menu signals and the official FAQ's sesame limitation were not fully represented.
findings.resolution: Mapped 31 fixed-positive formulations from published terms and mandatory named formats, kept ten formulations fixed-signal-free, applied only global may-contain sesame, and avoided unsupported negative or every-allergen claims.

findings.summary: Generic extraction lost section, configuration, currentness, fixed-ingredient, and FAQ context; the shared quality classifier also rejected three real sweets as alcohol bleed.
findings.resolution: Prepared a guarded current-menu manifest with exact invariants and narrowly taught the classifier to preserve food rows when section context or explicit soft-serve and Middle Eastern pastry names establish a dish.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested a 41-formulation Albi catalog across 11 sections with 31 fixed-positive rows, ten cross-contact-only rows, all 29 frozen rows reconciled, and the shared classifier false positive corrected.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/restaurant-verification/albi-isolated.generated.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 41 items, 11 categories, 31 fixed-positive rows, ten cross-contact-only rows, global sesame caution on every item, all sampled restorations, stale/artifact removal, classifier retention, and idempotent Albi guard behavior)

notes: Corrected snapshot SHA-256: e2a4f37da5b470e10e5b759c72e6d9143243607ed5089c7ba5fd4b4911056043.

Reconciliation counts: {"dispositions":{"exact_match":17,"variant_match":3,"stale_extra":2,"artifact":2,"normalized_match":5},"allergens":{"mismatch":25,"not_applicable":4},"mismatchKinds":{"underreported":24,"cross_contact_scope_added":1}}.
Current corrected catalog counts: 41 formulations, 41 presentations, 11 source sections, 31 fixed-positive rows, and ten cross-contact-only rows.
